business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality operations including hotels and restaurants with clerical office support

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-HCHP-2025-3350; Large Risk rating plan; Interstate Rating: Yes; Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94

positives: Experience modification factor of 0.94 (credit mod, below unity)
No excess losses across three prior policy years
All reported claims are relatively low severity (primary losses only)
concerns: Claim frequency increased in earlier years (8 claims in 2021-2022, 6 in 2022-2023)
Hospitality class codes (9052, 9060, 9082) tend to have elevated injury exposure
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year loss history: 2023-2024: 2 claims / $9,940 incurred; 2022-2023: 6 claims / $26,662 incurred; 2021-2022: 8 claims / $56,343 incurred. Total actual primary losses $92,945 with no excess losses.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet for Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC under policy WC-HCHP-2025-3350 (2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01), valued 2026-03-15. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Payroll classifications include Hotel — All Other Employees (9052) $9,207,271; Hotel — Bellhops, Doorpersons (9060) $1,454,400; Restaurant — NOC (9082) $3,678,800; Clerical Office Employees — NOC (8810) $1,920,000.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Actual Primary Losses $92,945; Actual Excess Losses $0; Expected Losses $361,806; Weighting Factor 0.419; Expected Excess Losses $422,385; Ballast Value $29,114. Numerator $367,465 / Denominator $390,920 = Calculated Mod 0.9400.
